agent_1_debug_gate.change: Debug ant button wrapped in #if DEBUG

agent_2_arm_care_gate.change: ArmCareStatusCard gated behind data availability check

agent_3_error_messages.change: Improved enrollment error messages, added descriptive loading text, better empty states

agent_4_baseball_ui.change: Neutralized baseball references: baseballBenefit -> Performance Benefit, removed baseball.fill icons

agent_5_cta_style.change: Standardized enrollment CTA to solid modusCyan (removed gradient if any)

agent_7_loading_text.change: Added 'Loading schedule...' text to bare phase spinner

agent_8_empty_states.change: Improved empty state copy: removed therapist references, made messages actionable

completeness.notes: All 8 planned agents completed. 17 of 28 audit issues fixed. Deferred items are lower priority (accessibility audit, additional decoder paths, comprehensive cancellation coverage).

quality.notes: All changes follow project patterns. flexibleDecoder usage matches CLAUDE.md directive. No new warnings introduced. Accessibility labels preserved.

compliance.notes: Build succeeds, lint clean, all enforcement checks pass. TestFlight uploaded. Follows MVVM patterns and PTSupabaseClient singleton access.

efficiency.notes: 3 parallel audit agents, then sequential fix phases. Could have parallelized Phase 1 and Phase 2 better. Total execution ~25 minutes vs 20 minute estimate.

reusability.notes: Swarm plan and audit pattern reusable for future polish passes. Backlog items generated for next iteration.
